purpose: Verify that a user prompt routes to the correct skill between bitopro-spot and bitopro-market-intel after the 2026-04-15 description collision fix. Target accuracy >= 95% on each bucket (spot-only, market-intel-only). Ambiguous prompts are excluded from the accuracy denominator and logged separately.

scoring.ambiguous_handling: If expected_skill is 'either', both answers count as pass; these are reported but not included in the 95% gate.

cases.prompt: 幫我用市價買 500 USDT 的 ETH
把我 btc_twd 所有未成交單都取消
cases.rationale: Action: cancel all open orders on a pair

cases.prompt: 我帳戶現在 USDT 還剩多少？
列出今天所有成交紀錄
Show me the current order book depth for eth_twd, top 20 levels
cases.rationale: Execution-time data for a single specified pair (pre-trade)

cases.prompt: 把 order id 123456789 改掉，用 LIMIT 單 0.01 BTC @ 2500000 TWD
設一個停損單：btc_twd，當價格跌破 2,200,000 時市價賣 0.05 BTC
過去 30 天的 USDT 出金紀錄給我看
幫我提 100 USDT 到這個 TRC20 地址 T...xxx
一次下 5 筆 LIMIT 買單，都是 eth_twd
ETH 現在即時成交價多少？我要下單前確認一下
cases.rationale: Real-time ticker on a specified pair, pre-trade context

cases.prompt: 幫我抓 btc_twd 過去 4 小時的 K 線 (1m)
我現在掛著哪幾張單？全部列出來
查 order id 987654321 這張單最後成交狀態
Cancel order 555666 on eth_usdt
最近 10 筆 btc_twd 的市場成交流水（public trades）
cases.rationale: Recent trades on a specified pair — execution-time data

cases.prompt: 我要從錢包轉 BTC 進來，查一下入金紀錄有沒有到
幫我掛一張 limit 賣單：0.1 BTC @ 2,600,000
eth_twd 的 OTC 買賣價現在多少？
cases.rationale: OTC price endpoint lives in spot

cases.prompt: 清掉我所有 eth_usdt 的掛單
現在市場恐慌貪婪指數多少？
過去 30 天 Fear & Greed 指數走勢
目前 BTC dominance 多少？ETH 呢？
BitoPro 上架的幣當中，市值排名前 10 是哪些？
cases.rationale: Market-cap ranking scoped to BitoPro coins

cases.prompt: 今天 CoinGecko trending 裡面，有哪幾個是 BitoPro 有上的？
上市公司持有 BTC 前 10 名
Companies holding ETH as treasury, give me the latest list
SOL 最近 1 小時、24 小時、7 天、30 天漲跌幅各多少？
BitoPro 現在總共上架了哪幾個幣？給我完整清單
eth_twd 的最小下單量、最大下單量、數量精度、掛單上限各是多少？
今天整體市場氣氛如何？恐慌還是貪婪？
BitoPro 有支援 DOGE 嗎？最小買多少？
MSTR 目前持有多少 BTC？換算成美元多少？
BitoPro 上市值最低的 5 個幣（只看排名，不做建議）
Which BitoPro coins are in today's CoinGecko top 15 trending list?
ADA 在 BitoPro 上過去 7 天漲跌 %？
比特幣市佔率今天跌了嗎？
BitoPro 上的幣依 24h 漲幅排序
LINK 現在在 BitoPro 的掛單上限、維護狀態
幫我看一下目前整體加密市場的總市值
BTC 多少錢？
cases.rationale: No pair, no context — could be macro (market-intel) or a quick ticker (spot). Either is acceptable; check consistency.

cases.prompt: 幫我看一下 ETH 的狀況
cases.rationale: Vague 'status' — could be multi-timeframe snapshot or ticker/book.

cases.prompt: BitoPro 上 SOL 最小可以買多少，然後幫我用市價買一單最小量
cases.rationale: Compound: spec lookup + action. Must land on spot (action dominates); spot can internally call get_trading_pairs.

cases.prompt: SOL 過去 30 天漲多少？如果順勢，我想掛一張 LIMIT 買單
cases.rationale: Compound: snapshot then MAYBE order. Should start with market-intel; spot invoked only if user confirms.

cases.prompt: Is the market fearful right now, and how's BTC order book looking on BitoPro?
cases.rationale: Truly two-skill question (macro + execution). Acceptable to route to either and call the other as follow-up.

how_to_run: 1. For each case, feed the prompt to a fresh Claude Code session with ONLY bitopro-spot and bitopro-market-intel installed.
2. Record which skill description the router loads first (observable from the Skill tool invocation).
3. Mark pass if selected_skill == expected_skill (or either answer for 'either' cases).
4. Compute per-bucket accuracy over spot_only and market_intel_only; require >= 0.95 on both.
5. Any miss: inspect WHY — is the losing description missing a keyword, or is the winning description over-claiming? Adjust descriptions, re-run only the failed cases.
failure_modes_to_watch: '價格' / 'price' — spot handles real-time pair ticker, market-intel handles % change snapshot. If both claim it, spot wins execution-context phrasing.
'掛單上限' / 'min order size' / 'precision' — must route to market-intel (catalog). Spot can still internally call the same endpoint for pre-trade validation.
